glosses.ja: コレクション; 収集品

translations.es: Me encanta tu colección de vinilos.
translations.it: Adoro la tua collezione di vinili.
translations.zh-Hans: 我很喜欢你的黑胶唱片收藏。
translations.yue: 我好鍾意你嘅黑膠碟收藏。
translations.ru: Я обожаю твою коллекцию виниловых пластинок.
translations.pt: Eu adoro a tua coleção de discos de vinil.
translations.he: אני אוהב את אוסף התקליטים שלך.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích bộ sưu tập đĩa than của bạn.
translations.ar: أنا أحب مجموعة أسطوانات الفينيل لديك.
translations.nl: Ik ben dol op jouw platenverzameling.
translations.uk: Я обожнюю твою колекцію вінілових платівок.
translations.hi: मुझे तुम्हारी विनाइल रिकॉर्डों का संग्रह बहुत पसंद है.
translations.el: Λατρεύω τη συλλογή σου από βινύλια.
translations.id: Aku suka sekali koleksi piringan hitam kamu.
translations.ro: Ador colecția ta de discuri de vinil.
translations.ja: あなたのレコードコレクションが大好きです.

tokens.explanation: Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular) with clitic subject j' (je) elided before a vowel; transitive, selects a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; agrees feminine singular with the head noun 'collection'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'J'adore'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement of 'collection'.
Common noun, masculine plural; complement of 'collection' introduced by 'de'.

sentences.target: On range ma collection de mangas.

translations.fr: On range ma collection de mangas.
translations.es: Estamos ordenando mi colección de manga.
translations.it: Stiamo mettendo in ordine la mia collezione di manga.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在整理我的漫画收藏。
translations.yue: 我哋喺執緊我嘅漫畫收藏。
translations.ru: Мы приводим в порядок мою коллекцию манги.
translations.pt: Estamos arrumando a minha coleção de mangás.
translations.he: אנחנו מסדרים את אוסף המנגה שלי.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang sắp xếp bộ sưu tập manga của tôi.
translations.ar: نحن نرتب مجموعة المانغا الخاصة بي.
translations.nl: We zijn mijn mangacollectie aan het opruimen.
translations.hi: हम मेरी मंगा संग्रह को व्यवस्थित कर रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang merapikan koleksi manga saya.
translations.ro: Facem ordine în colecția mea de manga.
translations.da: Vi rydder op i min mangasamling.
translations.ja: 私のマンガコレクションを片づけています.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal pronoun used as the subject; triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); transitive, takes 'ma collection' as direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees feminine singular with 'collection'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'range'.
Preposition marking the noun complement of 'collection'.
Common noun, masculine plural; complement of 'collection' introduced by 'de'.

sentences.target: Tu regardes ma collection de plantes.

translations.fr: Tu regardes ma collection de plantes.
translations.en: You’re looking at my plant collection.
translations.es: Estás mirando mi colección de plantas.
translations.de: Du schaust dir meine Pflanzensammlung an.
translations.it: Stai guardando la mia collezione di piante.
translations.ko: 너는 내 식물 컬렉션을 보고 있어.
translations.ru: Ты смотришь на мою коллекцию растений.
translations.pt: Você está olhando para a minha coleção de plantas.
translations.he: אתה מסתכל על אוסף הצמחים שלי.
translations.vi: Bạn đang xem bộ sưu tập cây của tôi.
translations.ar: أنت تنظر إلى مجموعتي من النباتات.
translations.uk: Ти дивишся на мою колекцію рослин.
translations.hi: तुम मेरे पौधों के संग्रह को देख रहे हो.
translations.el: Κοιτάς τη συλλογή των φυτών μου.
translations.id: Kamu sedang melihat koleksi tanaman saya.
translations.ro: Te uiți la colecția mea de plante.
translations.cs: Díváš se na mou sbírku rostlin.
translations.ja: あなたは私の植物コレクションを見ている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative (2nd person singular); transitive, selects 'ma collection' as direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees feminine singular with 'collection'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'regardes'.
Preposition introducing the noun complement of 'collection'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of 'collection' introduced by 'de'.

sentences.target: Sa collection est dans la vitrine.

translations.fr: Sa collection est dans la vitrine.
translations.en: Her collection is in the display case.
translations.es: La colección de ella está en la vitrina.
translations.de: Ihre Sammlung ist in der Vitrine.
translations.it: La sua collezione è nella vetrina.
translations.yue: 佢嘅收藏喺陳列櫃入面。
translations.pt: A coleção dela está na vitrine.
translations.vi: Bộ sưu tập của cô ấy ở trong tủ trưng bày.
translations.nl: Haar verzameling staat in de vitrinekast.
translations.hu: Az ő gyűjteménye a vitrínben van.
translations.el: Η συλλογή της είναι στη βιτρίνα.
translations.id: Koleksinya ada di dalam lemari pajangan.
translations.ja: 彼女のコレクションはショーケースに入っている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; agrees feminine singular with 'collection'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative (3rd person singular); links the subject to the locative predicate.
Preposition introducing the locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'vitrine'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
